AJF_L43_X91_6A-4x_V1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E1
Recv ID: 7E9
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6E
Func Name: BVA

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "APY",
    "soft": "006A",
    "version": "6A60"
  }
]
